data.title: Inventor creates TREETOX salt bath for ADHD and autism, reduces pain and detoxifies; aims to provide convenient relief.
data.description: On July 31, 2025 in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Aurora, Colorado shared his innovative creation known as TREETOX. This new product aims to provide a simple solution for individuals with ADHD and autism to experience pain relief and enjoy a detoxifying bath. The inventor expressed his motivation stating that he wanted to make it easier for these individuals to benefit from a soothing soak. The TREETOX is a conveniently packaged design that removes the hassle of having to search for individual ingredients.

data.title: OSR Holdings updates on Equity Line of Credit, ensuring transparency in financial dealings.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, OSR Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSRH), headquartered in Bellevue, Washington, a prominent healthcare organization focusing on biomedical innovation for global health improvement, released a transparency report on its Equity Line of Credit. This update signifies the company's commitment to maintaining clear communication with stakeholders and ensuring financial information dissemination. OSR Holdings, Inc. remains dedicated to leveraging innovative approaches to enhance overall health and wellness on a worldwide scale, contributing significantly to the betterment of global health outcomes.

data.title: Comic Exporters, Inc. and Comic Holdings, Inc. to sell 100% of Diamond Comic Distributors UK to Diamond Distributors UK Ltd.
data.description: In Hunt Valley, Maryland on July 31, 2025, Comic Exporters, Inc. and Comic Holdings, Inc., both subsidiaries of Diamond Comic Distributors Inc., revealed their decision to sell all shares of Diamond Comic Distributors UK ("Diamond UK") to Diamond. This transaction will involve transferring 100% ownership of Diamond UK to Diamond, marking a significant development in the comic distribution industry.

data.title: CIEE BridgeUSA Celebration Tour showcases support for U.S. State Department's BridgeUSA Program, with Myrtle Beach as third stop.
data.description: CIEE's third stop on their countrywide roadshow will honor key backers of the U.S. Department of State's BridgeUSA Program in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. This event is scheduled for July 31, 2025, as part of CIEE's efforts to highlight supporters of this initiative.

data.title: FreeAdvice.com shared 8 steps to settle wildfire home insurance claims following a report that insurers deny 52% of claims.
data.description: A report on home insurance claims following wildfires was released by FreeAdvice.com in Tampa, Florida on July 31, 2025. The study revealed that 52% of wildfire claims are denied by insurers. In response to this issue, FreeAdvice.com provided eight useful tips for homeowners to prevent claim denials in the event of wildfires.

data.title: Vornado Realty Trust (NYSE: VNO) declares quarterly dividends on preferred shares. Board of Trustees announces the payout.
data.description: Today, in New York on July 31, 2025, Vornado Realty Trust (NYSE:VNO) disclosed that their Board of Trustees has approved the quarterly preferred dividends.

data.title: StarknightMT marks 8 years with its largest anniversary sale, focused on providing quality UTV/ATV products.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in New York, StarknightMT was established with a core belief that UTV/ATV users should not compromise on quality for affordability. The company caters to riders who extensively use their vehicles for various activities like transportation, adventure, or land labor. Over the span of eight years, StarknightMT has successfully implemented this vision, providing top-notch products at competitive prices for outdoor enthusiasts.

data.title: Air Products & Chemicals Inc. (NYSE: APD) reports Q3 2025 earnings of $3.09 EPS & $3.02B sales, beating estimates. Year-over-year sales grew 1% despite volume declines from LNG sale and lower global helium demand. Adjusted operating income flat at $741M, with Americas sales up 2% at $1.3B. Operating income down 4% at $374M. Portfolio optimization and project exits impact results.
data.description: Air Products & Chemicals Inc. reported better-than-expected fiscal Q3 2025 results, with adjusted EPS of $3.09 exceeding the estimated $2.98 and sales reaching $3.02 billion, surpassing the expected $2.96 billion. Sales in Q3 increased by 1% year over year, supported by higher energy cost pass-through, favorable pricing, and currency impacts, which counterbalanced volume declines from the September 2024 LNG business sale, lower global helium demand, and exited projects. GAAP EPS rose 4% to $3.24, with GAAP operating income climbing 7% to $791 million due to asset sales. Adjusted operating income remained flat at $741 million despite portfolio adjustments. Air Products' Americas sales increased by 2% to $1.3 billion from higher energy pass-through and pricing, offset by 6% lower volumes due to project exits and weak helium demand. Operating income for the Americas dropped 4% to $374 million, with a 200 basis points margin decrease to 29.7%.(Note: The character count for the summary is 997 characters including spaces)

data.title: EUROAPI released its 2025 Half-Year Financial Report, downloadable from their website.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, EUROAPI released its Half-Year Consolidated Financial Statements for the first six months of 2025. These condensed financial statements cover the period ending on June 30, 2025. Interested parties can access and download the document from EUROAPI’s official website at https://www.euroapi.com/en/investors/regulatory-information/financial-reports. Check the website for detailed financial information.

data.title: Applied Data Finance appoints Deena Narayanaswamy as EVP of Credit Risk, strengthening its team to offer AI-based lending.
data.description: In San Diego, a fintech company called Applied Data Finance (ADF) revealed its new appointments to the executive and leadership teams. They are dedicated to increasing fair credit access for underestimated U.S. consumers by using AI-driven underwriting. Deena Narayanaswamy has been named the Executive Vice President of Credit Risk at ADF, bringing almost 20 years of expertise in this field. These appointments showcase ADF's dedication to delivering scalable, transparent, and data-influenced lending solutions for consumers.
SEC Chair Atkins: Most crypto assets are not securities.

data.title: DeepTempo to appear at Black Hat USA 2025, DEF CON 33, BSides Las Vegas focusing on empowering defenders against evolving threats. Join for talks from August 4.
data.description: A tech company, DeepTempo, known for its behavioral threat detection using deep learning, is set to participate in major cybersecurity events like Black Hat USA 2025, DEF CON 33, and BSides Las Vegas. With the ever-changing cybersecurity environment facing threats driven by AI and polymorphic techniques, DeepTempo aims to support defenders through fostering community, collaboration, and enhanced detection with contextual information. To engage with DeepTempo experts and participate in panel discussions and talks, interested individuals can join them from August 4 onwards at these events. Specifically, DeepTempo can be located at Black Hat USA 2025.
